title: Sysco
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Sysco |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Clean up the mess, set a course for Sulon, and arrange something special for dinner. The Valley is ours.''"
"''Yes, sir.|Jerec and Captain Sysco|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Sysco''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] who served aboard the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance (Vengeance-class)|''Vengeance'']], the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]], during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. Sysco was present on the ''Vengeance'' when Jerec's [[Seven Dark Jedi|Dark Jedi followers]] captured and systematically [[Death/Legends|executed]] a band of rebels led by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn]]. Shortly after their deaths, Jerec ordered Sysco to turn the ''Vengeance'' toward the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|The prisoners are ready for interrogation, sir.|Captain Sysco, to Jerec|}} [[File:Vengeancestern.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Vengeance'', Sysco's assigned ship]] Sysco was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|starfleet]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. Sysco, who held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Captain/Legends|captain]], served aboard the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance (Vengeance-class)|''Vengeance'']], the [[Vengeance-class dreadnought|dreadnought]] that acted as the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the Imperial [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]]. That year, the ''Vengeance'' captured a fleeing [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dorlo]]. The [[Corvette/Legends|corvette's]] crew, led by the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn]], was subsequently captured by the Dark [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Boc Aseca]] and brought before Sysco on the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]]. After an orderly informed the [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] of the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] military protocol, Sysco told Jerec that the prisoners were ready to be interrogated. Jerec approached them and demanded information on the whereabouts of the mythical [[Valley of the Jedi]]. However, the prisoners refused to answer any questions and all, save for Rahn, were subsequently executed by one of Jerec's [[Seven Dark Jedi|Dark Jedi followers]]. Jerec used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Drain Knowledge|rip the information]] he sought from Rahn and then left the Jedi where he stood. As a last stand, Rahn [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinetically grabbed]] the [[Yun's lightsaber|lightsaber]] of the Dark Jedi [[Yun]]. After Rahn severed one of Aseca's tendons, Sysco drew his [[Blaster/Legends|sidearm]] and attempted to shoot Rahn but was stopped by Jerec, who insisted that his followers needed the practice. Sysco [[Holster/Legends|holstered]] his weapon, only for Rahn to [[Sai tok/Legends|sever]] Jerec's minion [[Maw (Dark Jedi)|Maw]] at the waist. Rahn's rampage was finally ended by Jerec himself, who beheaded the Jedi Master. As the crew looked on, Jerec ordered Sysco to clean up the bodies, set a course for the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], and arrange a special dinner. Sysco agreed but first walked straight to his quarters—carefully stepping over Maw's severed [[Limb/Legends|legs]] in the process—to open a bottle of [[Bonadan booze]], which he kept in the bottom drawer of his desk. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Thank you, Captain, but no. The practice will do them good.''"
"''Practice. Yes, sir.|Jerec stops Sysco from intervening in the fight between Qu Rahn and the Dark Jedi|}} When Qu Rahn attacked Jerec's Dark Jedi, Sysco frowned at the Jedi's decision and attempted to attack on the behalf of the injured Boc Aseca. After Jerec intervened, claiming that his Dark Jedi needed the practice, Sysco wondered if Aseca would feel the same way. However, Sysco obediently lowered his weapon. Once Jerec left the bridge, Sysco briefly put his master's orders on hold in order to grab a bottle of [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]]. ==Behind the scenes== Captain Sysco was created for the [[1998]] novella ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'', which was written by [[William C. Dietz]]. Sysco appeared in the novella's second chapter, acting as Jerec's captain. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Sysco }} [[Category:Imperial Navy officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Jerec's personnel]] [[Category:Males]]
